name: accountants managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks tool
description: For accountants managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, inefficient consolidation causes late financial reporting. We provide a data aggregation tool instead of manual data entry and reconciliation.
problem_solved: Inefficient consolidation of financial statements from multiple clients

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient consolidation of financial statements from multiple clients
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accountants managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, inefficient consolidation causes late financial reporting. We provide a data aggregation tool instead of manual data entry and reconciliation.
